brandBriefPage.metaDescription: BSD-YBM AI Solutions — construction management with CRM, ERP, and modular AI. The boulevard that connects everyone.
brandBriefPage.title: BSD-YBM — AI Solutions
brandBriefPage.heroAlt: Illustration: a digital boulevard linking construction sites with an AI layer
brandBriefPage.intro: BSD-YBM is operations software built for construction and trades: one place where customer relationships (CRM), processes and money (ERP), and an AI layer work together — not separate tools patched with spreadsheets.
brandBriefPage.pathBody: The product follows a real workflow: capture information from site and office, process documents and invoices, run tasks and clients, and get a live picture with recommendations — AI embedded in screens and decisions, not a side chatbot.

crm.title: CRM tied to the job
crm.body: Clients, sites, statuses, and tasks — in the language of contractors and trades, not generic sales CRM.

erp.title: ERP for cash and operations
erp.body: Invoices, collections, spend, and commitments — linked to the project and the documents that feed the numbers.

ai.title: AI as depth
ai.body: Summaries, detection, next steps, and context — for your organization, trade, and data.

brandBriefPage.modularBody: Construction is diverse: development, general contractors, trades, and supervision need different wording and flows. BSD-YBM stays one frame — tuned to your workflow and specialty so the product speaks your language.
brandBriefPage.visualCrmTitle: From CRM to ERP — not two islands
brandBriefPage.visualCrmBody: People, contracts, and money meet in one data layer: fewer duplicates, clearer control of what actually happens on the job.
brandBriefPage.visualDocsBody: Intake, control, and extraction — so documents feed CRM, billing, and management, instead of dying in a folder.
brandBriefPage.footnote: This page summarizes product intent and brand for teams, investors, and partners — it does not replace the live app experience at `/app`.
